titleStmt.title: SII 11.148: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 148. (B.K. No. 22 of 1927-28.) HANAMANHĀḶ, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE LYING IN SURVEY No. 18.

summary.p: This slightly damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) who was ruling from his nelevīḍu at Kalyāṇapura. It registers certain contributions in kind on (the sale of) betel leaves to a certain Siṅga Gāvuṇḍa of Āluṁgeṟe in Kisukāḍu Seventy for his services to the One Thousand (Community of) Tambuligas made by several Seṭṭis and others in the presence of (the representatives of) the Five-Hundred Svāmis, Eighteen Paṭṭaṇas, Thirty-two Vēḷāpuras Sixty-four Ghaṭikāsthānas, Sixty-four Yōgapīṭhas, the Sixteen of the Eight Nāḍus, Gavaṟe, Gātrigas, Bīras and Bīravaṇigas.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 24, Pramādin, Paushya, śu. 10, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Sunday. These details regularly correspond to A.D. 1099, December 25, Sunday; ·22.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaru ka
lyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkhathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttumiralu svasti samastabhuvanavikhyāta paṁcasatacirasāsanalabdhānē
kaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita satyasaucācāracāritra nayavinayavinyāna vīrabaṇaṁ
jasamayadharmmapratipāḷanavisuddhaguḍḍadhvajavirājitānūna vāsudēvakaṇḍaḷīmū
ḷabhadrōdbhavaruṁ samastabhalluṁkidaṇdahasta rayyāvoḷepuraparamēsvarācārakaligaḷappa
śrīmadaynūrvvarsvāmigaḷuṁ Aṣṭādasapaṭṭaṇamuṁ dvātriṁsavēḷāpu
ramuṁ Aṟuvattanālkughaṭikasthānamuṁ cavuṣaṣṭiyōgapīṭhamuṁ
Eṁṭunāḍa padinaṟuvaruṁ gavaṟeyuṁ gātrigaruṁ bīraruṁ bīravaṇiga
ruṁ taṁbuliga sāsirvvaru miḻdu svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakā
ḷada 24 neya pramādi saṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha 10 mi Utta
rāyaṇasaṁkrānti Ādityavāradaṁdu maleyar siṁgiseṭṭiyuṁ kēti
seṭṭivuṁ rēcayagētiseṭṭivuṁ gallada kaleya bāciseṭṭi bādāviya ba
lidēvaseṭṭivuṁ hāvariya hicciseṭṭi tiḷivaḷḷiya kaliyammaseṭṭi
tiḷivaḷḷiya mottakāṟa siriyammaseṭṭi kaliya kētiseṭṭi keṟuvū
ra Eḍava caṭṭiseṭṭi siggāveya bharatiseṭṭi niṭṭasiṁgiya babbuḷa siriseṭṭi
tucciṁgeṟeya holliseṭṭi huḷḷamana sōviseṭṭi gājavūra Āriya padma
laseṭṭi gājavūra nāgulaseṭṭi cavuṇḍayyaseṭṭi yintinibaruṁ taṁbuli
ga sāsirvvaruṁ gavaṟeyuṁ gātrigaruṁ Aṣēsa seṭṭiyarumiḻdu kisu
kāḍeppattaṟa baḷiya bāḍada Āluṁgeṟeya siṁgagāvuṁṇḍaṁ taṁbuligasā
sirvvarartthaṁ tūṟaharu koṇḍaḍā yartthaṁ siṁgagāvuṁṇḍa nikkisi taṁda
ḍe sāsirvvaru miḻdu siṁgagavuṁḍaṁge mecci koṭṭa sāsanameṁ
ḍeleya gātrakke sāsireleyardda gātrakkaynū ṟele pa
dayvattele yintī sāsanamaryyādeyaṁ tappade
suvaru I śāsanamaryyādeya nāva norvvanaḷida
ḍanaṁ vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra gaṁgānadītīradoḷu grahaṇasaṁkrāntiyo
sāsirvvaru vēdapāraga brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsiraka
vileyu manaḷida pātakanakkuṁ I śāsanamaryyādeya nāvanūrvvaṁ
pratipāḷisidaṁ pratipāḷisidavaṁ vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra gaṁgānadī
tīradoḷu grahaṇasaṁkrāntiyoḷu sāsirvvaru vēdapāragabrāhmaṇara
sāsirakavileyumaṁ dānaṁgoṭṭa mahāpuruṣanakkuṁ
© © ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi
Digital edition of SII 11.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
